curation.original_command: scripts/benchmark.py run --models rtmw_x yolo26x_pose --datasets coco17_val2017 --precision fp16 --backend pytorch
curation.reason: Kept only the completed 5000-image YOLO COCO-17 benchmark evidence.

raw_artifacts.reason: Raw predictions and per-image logs are useful for debugging/resume but too large and unnecessary for cross-device result comparison in Git.
